summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of Lapakin (Indonesian SME CMS). Backend: 25/25 pytest tests passing including all auth flows, shops CRUD, products CRUD, ownership checks, public storefront, and all 3 AI endpoints (generate-content, suggest-theme, enhance-image with Nano Banana). Frontend: full E2E flow validated — landing → register → onboarding (AI suggest-theme working) → dashboard → AI Studio (generate content + save product) → products list → public storefront → logout.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 540-line file mixing models, auth helpers, and 5 resource groups. As app grows, consider splitting into routers/auth.py, routers/shops.py, routers/products.py, routers/ai.py, models.py, db.py.

CORS_ORIGINS defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True. Some browsers reject Set-Cookie when Origin is '*'. Currently works because frontend uses same external domain; recommend setting an explicit allowlist in prod.
Onboarding 'AI Sarankan' overwrites brand_color silently — UX is fine but no toast confirms which color was chosen (color preview swatch already updates, so acceptable).

Dashboard total-product count is fetched on mount; after saving a product in AI Studio and navigating directly to Products page, returning to /dashboard would still need a refetch (minor UX, not a bug).

open-storefront-btn is a <button> with onClick navigation, not an <a> with href. Works fine but means the URL cannot be opened in new tab via middle-click. Consider using <a target="_blank"> for the 'Lihat Toko' link.
/api/products PUT returns updated product but UI in Products.jsx only supports delete, not edit — feature gap acknowledged from MVP scope.
ai/enhance-image catches Exception but exposes raw e[:200] in detail string — generally fine for an MVP, but consider a friendlier Indonesian error message.
Pydantic EmailStr rejects .test/.local TLDs (PSL); document this for testers. Tests must use real-looking domains (e.g. example.com).
test_credentials: admin@lapakin.id / lapakin123 (admin), sari@warung.id / sari1234 (has shop warung-sari). Both verified working. Test users created during this run use TEST_/uitest_ prefix with @example.com domain.
seed_data_creation: pytest creates TEST_<runid>@example.com users + 'Toko Test <runid>' shops + a few test products. UI test created uitest_<ts>@example.com user + 'Toko UI Test <ts>' shop with 1 product 'Kopi Susu Aren'. None cleaned up — minor stale data only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is reusable regression suite (25 tests, ~30s incl. 3 AI calls). Run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. The AI/enhance-image test passed with a 1x1 PNG and returned a real image (Nano Banana works). All data-testid selectors found in pages: brand-logo, hero-cta-primary, register-{name|email|password}-input, register-submit-btn, onboard-{shop-name|shop-desc|next-btn|tagline|ai-suggest-btn|whatsapp|brand-color|finish-btn}, btype-<id>, dashboard-{cta-ai-studio|logout-btn}, copy-storefront-link, open-storefront-btn (button, not link), file-input, style-<id>, enhance-btn, product-{name|price|stock}-input, ai-hints-input, generate-content-btn, save-product-btn, add-product-btn, product-card-<id>, delete-<id>, storefront-shop-name, storefront-product-<id>, buy-<id>. Logout button DOES exist with testid 'dashboard-logout-btn' in DashboardLayout.
rca of the issue: No critical issues found. App is in good shape for MVP.
